provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: This Notice may be cited as the Standards (Declaration of Voluntary Standards) Notice, 2023

provisions.title: Declaration of voluntary standards
provisions.content: The Standards specified in the Schedule to this Notice are hereby declared to be voluntary standards for each commodity specified thereunder. Schedule(Made under paragraph 2) Voluntary standards S/N Standard Number Tittle Category 1. TZS 444/ISO 941-1980 Spices and condiments - Determination of cold-water soluble extract. Voluntary 2. TZS 1319/ISO 1108:1992 Spice and condiments - Determination of non-volatile ether extract. Voluntary 3. TZS 1318/ISO 939:1980 Spice and condiments - Determination of moisture content - entrainment method. Voluntary 4. TZS 1316/ISO 928:1997 Spices and Condiments - Determination of total ash. Voluntary 5. TZS 1315/ISO 927:2009 Spice and Condiments - Determination of Extraneous matter and foreign matter content. Voluntary 6. TZS 445/ISO 5567:1982 Dehydrated garlic - Determination of volatile organic sulphur compounds. Voluntary 7. TZS 29 Spices and condiments - Nomenclature. Voluntary 8.
